Info

Factory for creating InfoBundle components.

class ats_utilities.info.info_factory.InfoFactory[source]¶

Bases: object

Factory for creating InfoBundle components.

_ATTR_TO_CLASS: Final[Mapping[str, Any]] = mappingproxy({'ats_name': <class 'ats_utilities.info.name.engine.Name'>, 'ats_version': <class 'ats_utilities.info.version.engine.Version'>, 'ats_licence': <class 'ats_utilities.info.licence.engine.Licence'>, 'ats_build_date': <class 'ats_utilities.info.build_date.engine.BuildDate'>, 'ats_repository': <class 'ats_utilities.info.repository.engine.Repository'>, 'ats_organization': <class 'ats_utilities.info.organization.engine.Organization'>, 'ats_use_github_infrastructure': <class 'ats_utilities.info.use_github.engine.UseGitHub'>, 'ats_logo_path': <class 'ats_utilities.info.logo.engine.Logo'>, 'ats_log_file': <class 'ats_utilities.info.log_file.engine.LogFile'>, 'ats_info_ok': <class 'ats_utilities.info.info_ok.engine.InfoOk'>})¶
classmethod create_info_bundle_from_dict(info: Mapping[str, Any], context_bundle: ContextBundle) → InfoBundle[source]¶

Creates a default InfoBundle with pre-configured components.

Parameters:

  • info (<Mapping[str, Any]>) – Dictionary containing info components.

  • context_bundle (<ContextBundle>) – ContextBundle instance.

Returns:

Default InfoBundle instance.

Return type:

<InfoBundle>

Exceptions:

None.
